name: Potato-Vegetable Chowder (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peeled tomatoes, cut into pieces
1 cup Green beans or yellow wax beans
1 cup Zucchini or yellow squash, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring liquid to a boil in a deep soup kettle.
2. Add all vegetables and seasonings.
3. Turn down heat to simmer and partially cover the pot.
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
5. Serve hot with crusty whole wheat bread and a light fruit dessert.
Variation: Almost any vegetable but onions, tomatoes, and potatoes can be substituted for another vegetable. Don't use the cabbage family because the flavor is too radically changed. Green peas and baby lima beans are a great addition, as is 1/2 cup of corn kernels.
